reasoning: Billie Eilish recently achieved #1 in monthly listeners on Spotify, but the title of 'most streamed artist' for the year depends on total stream volume, which heavily favors artists with massive catalogs (like Taylor Swift, Drake, Bad Bunny, and The Weeknd). Eilish has a comparatively small back catalog (three full-length albums). Furthermore, she released her latest album 'Hit Me Hard and Soft' in May 2024; given her historical 2-3 year release cadence, she is very unlikely to drop a new album in 2025. Without a new album and a massive catalog to farm streams year-round, it is extremely difficult to surpass the streaming giants for total yearly volume.
